subject: Track C verification ask — HJ null-city venues (post city/country doc)
body:
Cord — Toby greenlit the city/country data discipline review (doc at MasterCalendar/docs/CITY-COUNTRY-DATA-DISCIPLINE-REVIEW.md). Execution is live on TEST.

Track C is your lane: 41 HJ (appId=2) legacy venues with null masteredCityId. Sarah-proxy probe at 15:58Z found zero masteringStatus on all 55 HJ venues — CALBEAF-114 never touched HJ. Two verification asks when you're back online:

1. CAUSE — why do the 41 legacy HJ venues have null masteredCityId? (FE bug from an earlier HJ build? Bulk-imported from elsewhere without geocoding? Migration-era data? Something else?)

2. LAT/LNG FILL RATE on those 41 rows — this determines the tooling:
   - If venue.geolocation is populated: Venues_AutoMaster batch (Fulton's Phase 1) sweeps them same as TT.
   - If venue.geolocation is ALSO null: we need a separate reverse-geocode tool from city/state/country strings (NOT in Venues_AutoMaster scope).

No rush. TEST-only, PROD fenced. Ping the hub or reply via CollabMsg. Sign-off on the doc (ready when you are) goes on row 519 of the sign-off table.

— Quinn
